io.github.igorgf.function.CheckedRunnable

Package
Description
io.github.igorgf.control
Core functional control-flow types for error handling and value presence.

    Description
    CheckedRunnable<Exception>
    WithFinally.action()
    Returns the value of the action record component.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <X extends Exception>
    void
    Empty.ifEmpty(CheckedRunnable<? extends X> emptyAction)
    If this is a Empty, performs the given action, otherwise does nothing.
    <X extends Exception>
    void
    Option.ifEmpty(CheckedRunnable<? extends X> emptyAction)
    If this is a Empty, performs the given action, otherwise does nothing.
    <X extends Exception>
    void
    Present.ifEmpty(CheckedRunnable<? extends X> emptyAction)
    Do nothing because this is a Present.
    <X extends Exception>
    void
    Empty.ifPresentOrElse(CheckedConsumer<? super T, ? extends X> action, CheckedRunnable<? extends X> emptyAction)
    If this is a Present, performs the given action with value, otherwise performs the empty case action.
    <X extends Exception>
    void
    Option.ifPresentOrElse(CheckedConsumer<? super T, ? extends X> action, CheckedRunnable<? extends X> emptyAction)
    If this is a Present, performs the given action with value, otherwise performs the empty case action.
    <X extends Exception>
    void
    Present.ifPresentOrElse(CheckedConsumer<? super T, ? extends X> action, CheckedRunnable<? extends X> emptyAction)
    If this is a Present, performs the given action with value, otherwise performs the empty case action.
    default Try<R>
    Try.withFinally(CheckedRunnable<Exception> action)
